headline: Report: Google in talks with Marvell to build new AI chips
summary: Alphabet's Google is in talks with Marvell Technology to ‚Äådevelop two new chips aimed at ‚Äårunning AI models more efficiently, The Information reported on ‚ÄãSunday citing two people with knowledge of the discussions.  One of the chips is a memory processing unit designed to work with ‚ÄåGoogle's tensor ‚ÅÝprocessing unit (TPU) and the other chip is a new TPU built ‚ÅÝspecifically for running AI models, the report said.  Google has been pushing to make its ‚ÄãTPUs a ‚Äãviable alternative to ‚ÄãNvidia's dominant GPUs. ‚ÄåTPU sales have become a key driver of growth in Google's cloud revenue as it aims to show investors that its AI investments are generating returns.
